title: Tango Frontiers
description: A modpack focusing on immersion and QOL features.
body:
## This modpack is made for people wanting to take Minecrafts immersion one step forward. Enjoy!
Tango Frontiers is a vanilla plus modpack that focuses on adding features to make the game feel more immersive like voicechat, VR support, better sound and more to come! Play with friends using the ingame voice chat and enjoy the great and more immersive gameplay.

![Tango Frontiers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6d4b14d6a148a1552faca74f51240d69167360_0.webp)
## Features
- ### FPS Boosting Mods:
These help deliver the best performance and run the game smoothly!
- ### Immersion Mods:
Makes things as simple as crafting or opening a door more immersive and engaging!
- ### QOL Mods:
Minecraft is going to feel better and less anoying with these.
- ### Funner with Friends!:
Ingame Spatial Voice Chat will make your game much more enjoyable with friends!

### Credits:
- Built off of: [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
